svg.title: Kaveh — Tokyo Night terminal profile
svg.desc: Tokyo-Night-styled GitHub profile hero with embedded JetBrains Mono Bold. Block-art KAVEH uses the GenAI-Vanilla LOGO_GRADIENT palette: #4A9EFF, #7DCFFF, #A8D4E6, #B4F9F8. Identity TS card and mission line below.

text.tspan: "Lead Staff Software Engineer | Data & ML Engineering"
"ship useful systems, keep the architecture clean, automate the boring parts"
Building scalable systems that turn data, models, and automation into practical leverage.
